name: Divine Almond Macaroons
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Coat a cookie sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
Beat the egg white with an electric mixer on high speed until foamy.
Add the cream of tartar and continue beating.
Gradually add the sugar and beat until stiff peaks form.
Add the almond and vanilla extracts and beat on medium speed just until blended.
Fold in the sliced almonds and rolled oats.
Drop the batter by rounded teaspoonfuls onto the cookie sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes, or until the cookies are lightly browned.
Lift off the cookie sheet very carefully as they are fragile.
Cool on a wire rack.
